response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and cloud platforms, but lacks direct mention of vector databases and retrieval-augmented generation architectures.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong background in TypeScript and cloud platforms
Proven ability to lead technical projects and contribute to various tech stacks
concerns: No direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures mentioned
Lack of explicit experience with multi-agent system frameworks
Limited cloud platform specifics beyond AWS

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience with RAG architectures
